logger.doc:name: Start Log
logger.message: transactionID: #[vars.transactionId], CoreelationID: #[vars.correlationId], message: Entered Insert DB and started registration covid case flow, #[payload]

db:insert.doc:name: Insert Covid Case Master
db:insert.db:sql:
INSERT INTO covid_case_master ( source, case_type, first_name, last_name, phone, email, date_of_birth, national_id, national_id_type, street_address, city, state, postal, country, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
) VALUES ( :source, :caseType, :firstName, :lastName, :phone, :email, :dateOfBirth, :nationalID, :nationalIDType, :streetAddress, :city, :state, :postal, :country, :createdAt, :updatedAt, :createdBy, :updatedBy );

logger.doc:name: End Logger
logger.message: transactionID: #[vars.transactionId], CoreelationID: #[vars.correlationId], message: Finished registration covid case flow, #[payload]

logger.doc:name: Start Log
logger.message: transactionID: #[vars.transactionId], CoreelationID: #[vars.correlationId], message: Entered update DB and started update covid case flow, #[payload]

db:update.doc:name: Update Covid Case Master
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE covid_case_master SET source = :source, case_type = :caseType, first_name = :firstName, last_name = :lastName, phone = :phone, email = :email, date_of_birth = :dateOfBirth, national_id = :nationalID, national_id_type = :nationalIDType, street_address = :streetAddress, city = :city, state = :state, postal = :postal, country = :country, updated_at = :updatedAt WHERE registration_id = :registrationId;

logger.doc:name: End Logger
logger.message: transactionID: #[vars.transactionId], CoreelationID: #[vars.correlationId], message: Finished update covid case flow, #[payload]

logger.doc:name: Start Log
logger.message: transactionID: #[vars.transactionId], CorrelationID: #[vars.correlationId], message: Entered get case by national ID DB covid case flow, #[payload]

logger.doc:name: End Logger
logger.message: transactionID: #[vars.transactionId], CorrelationID: #[vars.correlationId], message: Finished get case by national ID DB Call

logger.doc:name: Start Log
logger.message: transactionID: #[vars.transactionid], CorrelationID: #[vars.correlationId], message: Entered get report DB call

logger.doc:name: End Logger
logger.message: transactionID: #[vars.transactionId], CorrelationID: #[vars.correlationId], message: Finished get report DB call
